title: O Praise the LORD! His Praise Proclaim!

verses.text: I know the LORD is high in state; above all gods our God is great. The LORD performs what he decrees in heav’n and earth, in depths and seas. He makes the vapors to ascend in clouds from earth’s remotest end. The lightning and the rain he sends, and from his storehouse brings the winds.

Your name, O LORD, fore’er endures; through ev’ry age your fame is sure. The LORD his people will defend, and great compassion shows to them. The gods of gold are made by hand; their mouths can’t breathe, their eyes are blind, their ears are deaf, their mouths are dumb. All trusting them like them become.

O house of Isr’el, bless the Lord! O house of Aaron, bless the Lord! O house of Levi, bless the Lord! All you who fear him, bless the Lord! Now blest be God with one accord, The Lord from Zion be adored, Who makes Jerus’lem his abode. Sing hallelujah! Praise the Lord!

O house of Isr’el, bless the LORD! O house of Aaron, bless the LORD! O house of Levi, bless the LORD! All you who fear him, bless the LORD! Now blest be God with one accord, the LORD from Zion be adored, who makes Jerus’lem his abode. Sing hallelujah! Praise the LORD!
